decisions.description: Checking if the opportunity is linked to household account or Organization account
decisions.name: Check_Account_Type
decisions.label: Check Account Type

decisions.description: Checking if the opportunity is linked to household account or Organization account
decisions.name: Check_Account_Type_Inkind
decisions.label: Check Account Type

decisions.description: Checking if the opportunity is linked to household account or Organization account
decisions.name: Check_Account_Type_Reciept
decisions.label: Check Account Type

decisions.description: Checkbox check for Receipt, Unchecked for no Receipt.
decisions.name: Does_Donor_Require_Receipt
decisions.label: Does Donor Require Receipt?

Flow.description: Sends acknowledgement letter based on account type and receipt status
Flow.label: Opportunity: Email Acknowledgement

fields.name: enterCharitableFund
fields.fieldText: Please enter a Charitable Fund before sending this acknowledgement.

fields.name: EnterContact
fields.fieldText: Please enter a Primary Contact before sending this acknowledgement.

fields.name: Confirmation
fields.fieldText: Your acknowledgement email has successfully been sent.

fields.name: Confirm
fields.fieldText: Please review the fields below for accuracy.

fields.name: MissingEmail
fields.fieldText:
There is no email address on the Primary Contact's record.


﻿Please exist and update the Primary Contact's Email Address.

fields.name: Copy_1_of_Confirm
fields.fieldText: Please review the fields below for accuracy.

fields.name: MissingEmailInKind
fields.fieldText:
There is no email address on the Primary Contact's record.


﻿Please exist and update the Primary Contact's Email Address.

screens.description: Shows the user a preview of the email before sending it.
screens.name: No_Receipt_Email_Preview_HH
screens.label: No Receipt Email Preview HH

fields.name: displayEmailBody
fields.fieldText:
{!noReceiptEmailBodyHH}



Note: This Email Doesn't Include a Receipt to the Donor. If you would like to add a Receipt, please close this process and check the "Receipt Required?" field in the Detail Section.


READY TO SEND THIS EMAIL? If so, click Next. If not, make adjustments to the Opportunity and Primary Contact records and refresh the page.

screens.description: Shows the user a preview of the email before sending it.
screens.name: No_Receipt_Email_Preview_Org
screens.label: No Receipt Email Preview Org

fields.name: Copy_1_of_displayEmailBody
fields.fieldText:
{!noReceiptEmailBodyOrg}



Note: This Email Doesn't Include a Receipt to the Donor. If you would like to add a Receipt, please close this process and check the "Receipt Required?" field in the Detail Section.


READY TO SEND THIS EMAIL? If so, click Next. If not, make adjustments to the Opportunity and Primary Contact records and refresh the page.

screens.description: Shows the user a preview of the email before sending it.
screens.name: Receipt_Email_Preview_HH
screens.label: Receipt Email Preview HH

fields.name: displayEmailBody2
fields.fieldText:
{!receiptEmailBodyHH}


Note: This Email Includes a Receipt to the Donor. If you would like to remove the Receipt, please close this process and uncheck the "Receipt Required?" field in the Detail Section.


READY TO SEND THIS EMAIL? If so, click Next. If not, make adjustments to the Opportunity and Primary Contact records and refresh the page.

screens.description: Shows the user a preview of the email before sending it.
screens.name: Receipt_Email_Preview_InKind_HH
screens.label: Receipt Email Preview InKind HH

screens.description: Shows the user a preview of the email before sending it.
screens.name: Receipt_Email_Preview_InKind_Org
screens.label: Receipt Email Preview InKind Org

screens.description: Shows the user a preview of the email before sending it.
screens.name: Receipt_Email_Preview_Org
screens.label: Receipt Email Preview Org

fields.name: Copy_1_of_displayEmailBody2
fields.fieldText:
{!receiptEmailBodyOrg}


Note: This Email Includes a Receipt to the Donor. If you would like to remove the Receipt, please close this process and uncheck the "Receipt Required?" field in the Detail Section.


READY TO SEND THIS EMAIL? If so, click Next. If not, make adjustments to the Opportunity and Primary Contact records and refresh the page.

textTemplates.name: inKindEmailBodyHH
textTemplates.text:
Dear {!Get_Opportunity_Record.npsp__Primary_Contact__r.FirstName},


Thank you for your generous donation supporting Red Horse Center. 


Your help is an invaluable contribution to providing equitable access to personal wellness, mental health, and personal development programs.


Together, we are creating and holding space for people to find peaceful, empowering support for their healing transformation, while also supporting our incredibly generous herd of four-legged co-facilitators. 


Your donation makes many things possible, including our variable pricing structure, an effort towards judgment and stigma-free financial support for people to engage in services, and our no-cost workshops for local schools. 


From our herd to yours, thank you. 


Fred Bueltmann

Executive Director


For more information visit our website at www.redhorse.red, follow our social media pages, or join our Facebook group, "Friends of Red Horse." 

Facebook PageInstagramFriends of Red HorseTiktok


Donation Receipt:


Red Horse Center for Collaborative Leadership (RHCCL) is recognized federally as a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization eligible to receive tax-deductible contributions and gifts.

RHCCL (EIN): 85-2814738

RHCCL confirms the receipt of the following In-Kind donation: {!Get_Opportunity_Record.npsp__In_Kind_Description__c}

Name of Donor: {!Get_Opportunity_Record.npsp__Primary_Contact__r.FirstName}{!Get_Opportunity_Record.npsp__Primary_Contact__r.LastName}

Date of Donation: {!Get_Opportunity_Record.CloseDate}

In Honor of: {!Get_Opportunity_Record.npsp__Honoree_Name__c}

textTemplates.name: inKindEmailBodyOrg
textTemplates.text:
Dear {!Get_Opportunity_Record.npsp__Primary_Contact__r.FirstName},


Thank you for {!Get_Opportunity_Record.Account.Name}'s generous donation supporting Red Horse Center. 


Your help is an invaluable contribution to providing equitable access to personal wellness, mental health, and personal development programs.


Together, we are creating and holding space for people to find peaceful, empowering support for their healing transformation, while also supporting our incredibly generous herd of four-legged co-facilitators. 


Your donation makes many things possible, including our variable pricing structure, an effort towards judgment and stigma-free financial support for people to engage in services, and our no-cost workshops for local schools. 


From our herd to yours, thank you. 


Fred Bueltmann

Executive Director


For more information visit our website at www.redhorse.red, follow our social media pages, or join our Facebook group, "Friends of Red Horse." 

Facebook PageInstagramFriends of Red HorseTiktok


Donation Receipt:


Red Horse Center for Collaborative Leadership (RHCCL) is recognized federally as a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization eligible to receive tax-deductible contributions and gifts.

RHCCL (EIN): 85-2814738

RHCCL confirms the receipt of the following In-Kind donation: {!Get_Opportunity_Record.npsp__In_Kind_Description__c}

Name of Donor: {!Get_Opportunity_Record.Account.Name}

Date of Donation: {!Get_Opportunity_Record.CloseDate}

In Honor of: {!Get_Opportunity_Record.npsp__Honoree_Name__c}

textTemplates.description: This is the Email Body of the email to the Donors that don't require a receipt (Charitable Fund) for Households
textTemplates.name: noReceiptEmailBodyHH
textTemplates.text:
Dear {!Get_Opportunity_Record.npsp__Primary_Contact__r.FirstName},


Thank you for your generous donation supporting Red Horse Center. 


Your help is an invaluable contribution to providing equitable access to personal wellness, mental health, and personal development programs.


Together, we are creating and holding space for people to find peaceful, empowering support for their healing transformation, while also supporting our incredibly generous herd of four-legged co-facilitators. 


Your donation makes many things possible, including our variable pricing structure, an effort towards judgment and stigma-free financial support for people to engage in services, and our no-cost workshops for local schools. 


From our herd to yours, thank you. 


Fred Bueltmann

Executive Director


For more information visit our website at www.redhorse.red, follow our social media pages, or join our Facebook group, Friends of Red Horse,  Facebook Page  Instagram    Tiktok


Red Horse Center for Collaborative Leadership (RHCCL) is recognized federally as a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization eligible to receive tax-deductible contributions and gifts.

RHCCL (EIN): 85-2814738


This donation was received through a charitable fund or cooperative organization: {!Get_Opportunity_Record.Charitable_Fund__c}. Recognizing that the organization you're working with will provide you the necessary receipts and documentation, this letter serves as an acknowledgement of gratitude, rather than a tax-deductible receipt. If you require any additional documentation, just let us know.

Red Horse acknowledges and appreciates the following donation:

Name of Donor: {!Get_Opportunity_Record.npsp__Primary_Contact__r.FirstName} {!Get_Opportunity_Record.npsp__Primary_Contact__r.LastName}

Date of Donation: {!Get_Opportunity_Record.CloseDate}

Donation amount received: {!Get_Opportunity_Record.Amount}

In Honor of: {!Get_Opportunity_Record.npsp__Honoree_Name__c}

textTemplates.name: noReceiptEmailBodyOrg
textTemplates.text:
Dear {!Get_Opportunity_Record.npsp__Primary_Contact__r.FirstName},


Thank you for {!Get_Opportunity_Record.Account.Name}'s generous donation supporting Red Horse Center. 


Your help is an invaluable contribution to providing equitable access to personal wellness, mental health, and personal development programs.


Together, we are creating and holding space for people to find peaceful, empowering support for their healing transformation, while also supporting our incredibly generous herd of four-legged co-facilitators. 


Your donation makes many things possible, including our variable pricing structure, an effort towards judgment and stigma-free financial support for people to engage in services, and our no-cost workshops for local schools. 


From our herd to yours, thank you. 


Fred Bueltmann

Executive Director


For more information visit our website at www.redhorse.red, follow our social media pages, or join our Facebook group, Friends of Red Horse,  Facebook Page  Instagram    Tiktok


Red Horse Center for Collaborative Leadership (RHCCL) is recognized federally as a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization eligible to receive tax-deductible contributions and gifts.

RHCCL (EIN): 85-2814738


This donation was received through a charitable fund or cooperative organization: {!Get_Opportunity_Record.Charitable_Fund__c}. Recognizing that the organization you're working with will provide you the necessary receipts and documentation, this letter serves as an acknowledgement of gratitude, rather than a tax deductible receipt. If you require any additional documentation, just let us know.

Red Horse acknowledges and appreciates the following donation:

Name of Donor: {!Get_Opportunity_Record.Account.Name}

Date of Donation: {!Get_Opportunity_Record.CloseDate}

Donation amount received: ${!Get_Opportunity_Record.Amount}

In Honor of: {!Get_Opportunity_Record.npsp__Honoree_Name__c}

textTemplates.description: This is the Email Body of the email to the Donors that require a receipt for Households
textTemplates.name: receiptEmailBodyHH
textTemplates.text:
Dear {!Get_Opportunity_Record.npsp__Primary_Contact__r.FirstName},


Thank you for your generous donation supporting Red Horse Center. 


Your help is an invaluable contribution to providing equitable access to personal wellness, mental health, and personal development programs.


Together, we are creating and holding space for people to find peaceful, empowering support for their healing transformation, while also supporting our incredibly generous herd of four-legged co-facilitators. 


Your donation makes many things possible, including our variable pricing structure, an effort towards judgment and stigma-free financial support for people to engage in services, and our no-cost workshops for local schools. 


From our herd to yours, thank you. 


Fred Bueltmann

Executive Director


For more information visit our website at www.redhorse.red, follow our social media pages, or join our Facebook group, "Friends of Red Horse." 

Facebook Page  Instagram  Friends of Red Horse  Tiktok


Donation Receipt:


Red Horse Center for Collaborative Leadership (RHCCL) is recognized federally as a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization eligible to receive tax-deductible contributions and gifts.

RHCCL (EIN): 85-2814738

RHCCL confirms the receipt of the following donation:

Name of Donor: {!Get_Opportunity_Record.npsp__Primary_Contact__r.FirstName} {!Get_Opportunity_Record.npsp__Primary_Contact__r.LastName}

Date of Donation: {!Get_Opportunity_Record.CloseDate}

Donation amount received: {!Get_Opportunity_Record.Amount}

In Honor of: {!Get_Opportunity_Record.npsp__Honoree_Name__c}

textTemplates.name: receiptEmailBodyOrg
textTemplates.text:
Dear {!Get_Opportunity_Record.npsp__Primary_Contact__r.FirstName},


Thank you for {!Get_Opportunity_Record.Account.Name}'s generous donation supporting Red Horse Center. 


Your help is an invaluable contribution to providing equitable access to personal wellness, mental health, and personal development programs.


Together, we are creating and holding space for people to find peaceful, empowering support for their healing transformation, while also supporting our incredibly generous herd of four-legged co-facilitators. 


Your donation makes many things possible, including our variable pricing structure, an effort towards judgment and stigma-free financial support for people to engage in services, and our no-cost workshops for local schools. 


From our herd to yours, thank you. 


Fred Bueltmann

Executive Director


For more information visit our website at www.redhorse.red, follow our social media pages, or join our Facebook group, "Friends of Red Horse." 

Facebook Page  Instagram  Friends of Red Horse  Tiktok

Donation Receipt:


Red Horse Center for Collaborative Leadership (RHCCL) is recognized federally as a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization eligible to receive tax-deductible contributions and gifts.

RHCCL (EIN): 85-2814738

RHCCL confirms the receipt of the following donation:

Name of Donor: {!Get_Opportunity_Record.Account.Name}

Date of Donation: {!Get_Opportunity_Record.CloseDate}

In Honor of: {!Get_Opportunity_Record.npsp__Honoree_Name__c}
